<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\File\Exception; /** * Thrown when the access on a file was denied. * * @author Bernhard Schussek <bschussek@gmail.com> */ class AccessDeniedException extends FileException { public function __construct(string $path) { parent::__construct(\sprintf('The file %s could not be accessed', $path)); } }
